# Codex Skill Index

Skill ownership is generated from `.codex/agent_registry_v1.json`. Codex scans
the `.agents/skills` discovery adapters; each is a symlink to the canonical
`.claude/skills` corpus, so both platforms use one body without content drift.
On-demand skills are never universal preload.
